perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a fluffy brown and white cat sitting on a white tiled floor, looking down at a large cockroach lying on its back. (2) The cat uses its right paw to gently touch and nudge the cockroach, which remains largely stationary. (3) The cat leans in extremely close, sniffing the cockroach's body, appearing as if it's about to 'kiss' it. (4) The cockroach flips over and begins to scuttle across the floor, and the cat immediately follows, pawing at it multiple times as it moves. (5) The cat eventually tries to bite at the cockroach, prompting the camera to shift slightly in reaction.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, high-pitched background track featuring repetitive, electronic-sounding meows ('nyan nyan') in a fast rhythm. (2) This music continues consistently throughout the video as the primary sound layer. (3) In the final few seconds, a female voice is heard off-screen, first shouting 'Ah!' in a surprised tone and then yelling 'Don't!!!' in Chinese with a panicked and distressed inflection. (4) No ambient environment noise or specific sound effects from the cat or cockroach are audible.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text '當你的貓喜歡玩蟑螂' (When your cat likes playing with cockroaches) appears at the start to set the context. (2) Decorative text '親牠??' (Kiss it??) appears as the cat leans in to sniff the insect. (3) '這貓不能要了?' (Can't keep this cat anymore?) appears with a humorous, skeptical tone. (4) '已噴清潔劑殺小強' (Already sprayed cleaner to kill the cockroach) provides functional background information. (5) '一直追?' (Always chasing?), '啊!' (Ah!), and '不要!!!' (Don't!!!) appear at the end, mirroring the off-screen speaker's emotional reaction.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Only one cat is the main focus; no humans appear on screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A long-haired, fluffy domestic cat with a mix of brown, gray, and white fur.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor floor made of large, light-colored square tiles with dark grout lines.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a humorous and relatable short-form video for pet owners by showcasing the unexpected and 'gross' curiosity of a cat playing with a cockroach, heightened by the owner's distressed vocal reaction.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of high-contrast text overlays and a popular 'nyan' meow background music theme.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the common 'ick' factor associated with cockroaches and the irony of a clean, fluffy pet cat interacting with one.
